---
title: "Publications"
---

```{css}
#| echo: false
h1 {
  display: none;
}
h2 {
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(57, 97, 117, 0.25);
  margin-top: 1.75rem;
  padding-bottom: 0.25rem;
}
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| results: asis

pubs <- yaml::yaml.load_file("src/pubs.yaml")
years <- pubs |>
  purrr::map_int("year") |>
  unique() |>
  sort(decreasing = TRUE)

format_publication <- function(pub) {
  glue::glue_data(pub,
    "{paste(author, collapse = ', ')}",
    "**{title}**",
    "*{journal}*",
    "{issue_pages}",
    "{year}.",
    .sep = ". ",
    .na = character()
  )
}

years |>
  purrr::map_chr(\(year) {
    year_pubs <- purrr::keep(pubs, \(pub) pub$year == year)
    paste0(
      "## ", year, " {#year-", year, "}\n\n",
      year_pubs |>
        purrr::map_chr(format_publication) |>
        paste(collapse = "\n\n")
    )
  }) |>
  cat(sep = "\n\n")
```
